
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0">
<title>DogFy</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
:root{
  --navy:#222b6b;--navy2:#1a2158;--navy3:#2d3a8c;
  --navylight:rgba(34,43,107,0.25);--navymid:#b0b8e8;
  --cream:#eee9e9;--cream2:#f5f1f1;
  --dark:#0e1020;--dark2:#161928;--dark3:#1e2235;
  --muted:#7b82a8;--border:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  --r:18px;--rl:26px;
}
html,body{height:100%;background:#0a0c18;font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif;color:#fff;overflow:hidden}
h1,h2,h3,h4{font-family:"Syne",sans-serif}
#app{width:100%;max-width:430px;height:100vh;max-height:900px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--dark);position:relative;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:0 0 120px rgba(34,43,107,0.5)}
.screen{position:absolute;inset:0;display:none;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;animation:sIn .25s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}
.screen.active{display:flex}
@keyframes sIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(16px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}}
.sb{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch}
.sb::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}

/* LOGO */
.logo-img{height:30px;object-fit:contain}
.logo-splash{height:48px;object-fit:contain}

/* SPLASH */
#s-splash{background:linear-gradient(155deg,#0e1020 0%,#141b45 50%,#0e1020 100%);justify-content:center;align-items:center}
.sp-glow{position:absolute;width:360px;height:360px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(34,43,107,0.5) 0%,transparent 70%);border-radius:50%;animation:pulse 4s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.6}50%{transform:scale(1.2);opacity:1}}
.sp-content{position:relative;z-index:2;text-align:center;padding:0 28px}
.sp-logobox{width:108px;height:108px;background:rgba(34,43,107,0.25);border:1.5px solid rgba(176,184,232,0.2);border-radius:32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 24px;animation:bIn .9s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1) .3s both;backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
@keyframes bIn{from{transform:scale(.25);opacity:0}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}
.sp-tag{color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;margin-top:8px;animation:fU .6s ease .9s both}
@keyframes fU{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.sp-cta{position:absolute;bottom:50px;left:0;right:0;padding:0 24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px;animation:fU .6s ease 1.1s both}

/* BTNS */
.btn{padding:16px;border-radius:50px;font-family:"Syne",sans-serif;font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;width:100%}
.btn:active{transform:scale(.97)}
.btn-cream{background:var(--cream);color:var(--navy)}
.btn-cream:hover{background:var(--cream2)}
.btn-navy{background:var(--navy);color:#fff}
.btn-navy:hover{background:var(--navy2)}
.btn-ol{background:transparent;color:#fff;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18)}
.btn-ol:hover{border-color:var(--navymid);color:var(--navymid)}
.btns{padding:9px 18px;border-radius:50px;font-family:"Syne",sans-serif;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.btns:active{transform:scale(.97)}
.btns-n{background:var(--navy);color:#fff}
.btns-d{background:var(--dark3);color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--border)}

/* LOGIN */
.lh{padding:52px 24px 22px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#131840 0%,var(--dark) 100%)}
.lh .bk{width:40px;height:40px;background:var(--dark3);border-radius:12px;border:none;color:#fff;font-size:1rem;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:22px}
.lh h2{font-size:1.65rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:4px}
.lh p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.86rem}
.type-pill{display:inline-flex;background:var(--dark3);border-radius:50px;padding:4px;margin-top:16px}
.tp{padding:8px 20px;border-radius:50px;font-size:.77rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;color:var(--muted)}
.tp.act{background:var(--navy);color:#fff}
.lf{padding:20px 24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:13px}
.fl{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:5px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em}
.fw{position:relative}
.fw .fi{position:absolute;left:14px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);opacity:.35;font-size:.9rem}
input[type=email],input[type=password]{width:100%;background:var(--dark3);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 14px 14px 42px;color:#fff;font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;transition:border-color .2s}
input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--navy3);background:rgba(34,43,107,.06)}
.ldiv{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;color:var(--muted);font-size:.76rem}
.ldiv::before,.ldiv::after{content:"";flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--border)}
.lftr{text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem}
.lftr a{color:var(--navymid);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600}

/* TOPBAR */
.topbar{height:62px;padding:0 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:var(--dark);flex-shrink:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.tr{display:flex;gap:9px}
.ibtn{width:36px;height:36px;background:var(--dark3);border-radius:11px;border:none;color:#fff;font-size:.9rem;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative}
.ibtn.nd::after{content:"";width:7px;height:7px;background:#e5553a;border-radius:50%;position:absolute;top:6px;right:6px;border:2px solid var(--dark)}

/* BOTTOM NAV */
.bnav{height:70px;background:var(--dark2);border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 6px;flex-shrink:0}
.ni{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:3px;cursor:pointer;padding:7px 4px;border-radius:13px;transition:all .2s;color:var(--muted);position:relative}
.ni.act{color:var(--navymid)}
.ni.act::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:-1px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:20px;height:2px;background:var(--navy3);border-radius:2px}
.ni-ic{font-size:1.2rem}
.ni-lb{font-size:.6rem;font-weight:600}

/* NEXT WALK */
.nxt{margin:16px 18px 0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy),var(--navy3));border-radius:var(--rl);padding:20px 22px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.nxt::before{content:"🐾";position:absolute;right:-5px;bottom:-8px;font-size:4rem;opacity:.1;transform:rotate(20deg)}
.nxt-lb{font-size:.66rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;opacity:.65;margin-bottom:4px}
.nxt-ti{font-family:"Syne",sans-serif;font-size:1.13rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:2px}
.nxt-in{font-size:.8rem;opacity:.76;margin-bottom:13px}
.nxt-ch{display:flex;gap:7px}
.chip{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:50px;padding:5px 11px;font-size:.69rem;font-weight:600}

/* SECTION HEAD */
.sh{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:17px 18px 10px}
.sh h3{font-size:.92rem;font-weight:700}
.sa{color:var(--navymid);font-size:.77rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:none}

/* PASSEADOR ROW */
.prow{display:flex;gap:11px;padding:0 18px 4px;overflow-x:auto}
.prow::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.pc{min-width:136px;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--r);padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;flex-shrink:0}
.pc:hover{border-color:rgba(176,184,232,.35);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.pc-av{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--dark3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.28rem;margin-bottom:8px;border:2px solid var(--border);position:relative}
.on{position:absolute;bottom:1px;right:1px;width:10px;height:10px;background:#2dcc8f;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--dark2)}
.pc-nm{font-size:.84rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1px}
.pc-dt{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:5px}
.pc-st{font-size:.72rem;color:#f5c842}

/* AGENDA LIST */
.alist{padding:0 18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px}
.ai{background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--r);padding:13px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.ai:hover{border-color:rgba(34,43,107,.4)}
.ai-dt{width:44px;text-align:center;background:var(--dark3);border-radius:11px;padding:7px 4px;flex-shrink:0}
.ai-dt .day{font-size:1.18rem;font-weight:800;line-height:1;color:var(--navymid)}
.ai-dt .mon{font-size:.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600}
.ai-if{flex:1}
.ai-if h4{font-size:.84rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1px}
.ai-if p{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)}
.tag{padding:3px 9px;border-radius:50px;font-size:.64rem;font-weight:700}
.tg{background:rgba(34,43,107,.28);color:var(--navymid)}
.ty{background:rgba(229,85,58,.14);color:#e5553a}
.td{background:var(--dark3);color:var(--muted)}

/* SEARCH */
.sw{position:relative;padding:10px 18px}
.sw::before{content:"🔍";position:absolute;left:30px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-size:.83rem}
.sbar{background:var(--dark3);border-radius:13px;padding:12px 13px 12px 40px;color:#fff;font-size:.87rem;border:1.5px solid var(--border);width:100%;font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif}
.sbar:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--navy3)}
.frow{display:flex;gap:7px;padding:0 18px 10px;overflow-x:auto}
.frow::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.fc{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:50px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;transition:all .2s;flex-shrink:0}
.fc.act{background:var(--navylight);border-color:var(--navy3);color:var(--navymid)}
.pcf{margin:0 18px 11px;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:17px;border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.pcf:hover{border-color:rgba(176,184,232,.3);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.pcf-tp{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:11px}
.pcf-av{width:50px;height:50px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--dark3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.38rem;flex-shrink:0;border:2px solid var(--navy)}
.pcf-nm{font-size:.91rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:1px}
.pcf-mt{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)}
.pcf-rt{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;margin-top:3px}
.pcf-rt span:first-child{color:#f5c842;font-size:.78rem}
.pcf-rt span:last-child{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)}
.ptags{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:11px}
.ptag{padding:4px 10px;border-radius:50px;background:var(--dark3);color:var(--muted);font-size:.67rem;font-weight:600}
.pcf-bt{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.pcf-pr{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:800}
.pcf-pr span{font-size:.67rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:400}

/* AGENDA CARD */
.tab-row{display:flex;padding:10px 18px;gap:0}
.tpill{flex:1;padding:9px;text-align:center;font-size:.77rem;font-weight:700;border-radius:50px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);border:none;background:none;transition:all .2s}
.tpill.act{background:var(--navy);color:#fff}
.acard{margin:0 18px 12px;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--rl);overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.ac-hd{padding:14px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.ac-hd.ok{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy),var(--navy3))}
.ac-hd.pend{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2a1810,#321e12)}
.ac-hd.dn{background:var(--dark3)}
.ac-t{font-family:"Syne",sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:.92rem}
.ac-b{padding:4px 9px;border-radius:50px;font-size:.63rem;font-weight:700;background:rgba(0,0,0,.25);color:white}
.ac-bd{padding:15px 18px}
.ac-r{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;margin-bottom:8px}
.ac-r:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.ac-ic{font-size:.9rem;width:17px;text-align:center}
.ac-tx{font-size:.79rem;color:var(--muted)}
.ac-tx strong{color:#fff}
.ac-ac{display:flex;gap:9px;padding:0 18px 15px}

/* PROFILE */
.ph{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#131840 0%,var(--dark) 100%);padding:26px 18px 20px;text-align:center}
.pav-w{position:relative;display:inline-block;margin-bottom:12px}
.pav{width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--dark3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:2rem;border:3px solid var(--navy)}
.av-ed{position:absolute;bottom:0;right:0;width:25px;height:25px;background:var(--navy);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.68rem;cursor:pointer}
.pname{font-size:1.28rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:3px}
.psub{color:var(--muted);font-size:.76rem;margin-bottom:8px}
.pplan{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:var(--navylight);border:1px solid rgba(34,43,107,.5);border-radius:50px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navymid)}
.pstats{display:flex;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden;margin:0 18px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.psi{flex:1;text-align:center;padding:12px 7px;border-right:1px solid var(--border)}
.psi:last-child{border:none}
.psn{font-family:"Syne",sans-serif;font-size:1.28rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navymid)}
.psl{font-size:.62rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:1px}
.pmenu{margin:14px 18px 0;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--rl);overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.pmi{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s}
.pmi:last-child{border:none}
.pmi:hover{background:rgba(34,43,107,.08)}
.pmi-ic{width:35px;height:35px;background:var(--dark3);border-radius:11px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.9rem}
.pmi-tx{flex:1}
.pmi-tx h4{font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600}
.pmi-tx p{font-size:.69rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:1px}
.pmi-ar{color:var(--muted);font-size:.76rem}
.pbadge{background:#e5553a;color:white;border-radius:50px;padding:2px 7px;font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700}

/* PASSEADOR HOME */
.earn{margin:14px 18px 0;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:18px;border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.ec-l p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.76rem;margin-bottom:3px}
.ec-amt{font-family:"Syne",sans-serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navymid)}
.ec-sb{font-size:.69rem;color:#2dcc8f;margin-top:2px}
.ec-ch{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:4px;height:42px}
.ec-bar{width:7px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--dark3)}
.ec-bar.act{background:var(--navy3)}
.sol{margin:0 18px 11px;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:16px 18px;border:1px solid rgba(229,85,58,.17)}
.sol-tp{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;margin-bottom:12px}
.sol-av{width:43px;height:43px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--dark3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.18rem;flex-shrink:0}
.sol-nm{font-size:.87rem;font-weight:700}
.sol-mt{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)}
.sol-nw{margin-left:auto;background:#e5553a;color:white;padding:3px 7px;border-radius:50px;font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700}
.sol-dt{display:flex;gap:7px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.sol-ch{background:var(--dark3);border-radius:50px;padding:4px 11px;font-size:.69rem;color:var(--muted)}
.sol-bts{display:flex;gap:9px}
.brec{flex:1;background:var(--dark3);color:var(--muted);padding:10px;border-radius:50px;font-size:.77rem;font-weight:700;border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.brec:hover{border-color:rgba(229,85,58,.4);color:#e5553a}
.bace{flex:2;background:var(--navy);color:#fff;padding:10px;border-radius:50px;font-size:.77rem;font-weight:700;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.bace:hover{background:var(--navy2)}

/* MAP */
.mapbox{margin:10px 18px 0;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--rl);height:128px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.mg{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.022) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.022) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:28px 28px}
.mrh{position:absolute;height:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.055)}
.mrv{position:absolute;width:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.055)}
.mp{position:absolute;border-radius:50% 50% 50% 0;transform:rotate(-45deg);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.mp::after{content:"";width:40%;height:40%;background:white;border-radius:50%}
.mp-y{width:15px;height:15px;left:40%;top:44%;background:var(--navy3)}
.mp-t{width:18px;height:18px;right:28%;top:24%;background:#e5553a}
.mo{position:absolute;bottom:10px;left:10px;background:rgba(14,16,32,.9);border-radius:9px;padding:7px 11px;font-size:.69rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
.mo-d{width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--navy3);border-radius:50%}

/* NIVEL */
.nv{margin:14px 18px 0;border-radius:var(--rl);overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(176,184,232,.14)}
.nv-h{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a2158,var(--navy));padding:15px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.nv-lv{font-family:"Syne",sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:.91rem}
.nv-st{font-size:1.05rem;letter-spacing:3px}
.nv-b{background:var(--dark2);padding:14px 18px}
.nv-pl{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:.69rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:7px}
.nv-bar{background:var(--dark3);border-radius:50px;height:7px;overflow:hidden}
.nv-fi{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--navy),var(--navy3));border-radius:50px}

/* DETAIL */
#s-dtl .dh{padding:50px 18px 20px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#131840 0%,var(--dark) 100%);text-align:center}
.d-av{width:82px;height:82px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--dark3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:2.1rem;margin:0 auto 12px;border:3px solid var(--navy)}
.d-nm{font-size:1.38rem;font-weight:800}
.d-sb{color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem;margin:3px 0 10px}
.d-rt{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:5px}
.d-rt .sts{color:#f5c842;font-size:.9rem}
.dsts{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:14px 18px}
.dsi{flex:1;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--r);padding:12px;text-align:center;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.dsn{font-family:"Syne",sans-serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navymid)}
.dsl{font-size:.63rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:1px}
.dsec{padding:0 18px 14px}
.dsec h3{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px}
.rv{background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--r);padding:12px 13px;margin-bottom:8px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.rv-tp{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px}
.rv-nm{font-size:.79rem;font-weight:600}
.rv-st{color:#f5c842;font-size:.69rem;margin-left:auto}
.rv-tx{font-size:.77rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5}
.ag-fx{padding:12px 18px;background:var(--dark);border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:11px;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0}
.ag-pr{flex:1}
.ag-pr span:first-child{font-size:1.28rem;font-weight:800;font-family:"Syne",sans-serif;color:var(--navymid)}
.ag-pr span:last-child{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)}

/* AGENDAR */
.cal{margin:0 18px 13px;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:15px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.cal-hd{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:11px}
.cal-mn{font-size:.87rem;font-weight:700}
.cal-nv{background:var(--dark3);border:none;color:var(--muted);width:27px;height:27px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.77rem}
.cal-dh{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:1px;margin-bottom:5px}
.cal-dh span{text-align:center;font-size:.59rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600}
.cal-ds{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:3px}
.cd{aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.75rem;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:none;color:var(--muted);transition:all .15s;position:relative}
.cd:hover{background:var(--dark3);color:#fff}
.cd.today{color:var(--navymid);font-weight:700}
.cd.sel{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;font-weight:700}
.cd.ev::after{content:"";position:absolute;bottom:2px;width:4px;height:4px;background:#e5553a;border-radius:50%}
.cd.emp{pointer-events:none}
.tslots{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:7px;padding:0 18px 13px}
.ts{padding:9px;border-radius:11px;text-align:center;font-size:.77rem;font-weight:600;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--dark2);color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.ts:hover{border-color:var(--navy3);color:var(--navymid)}
.ts.sel{background:var(--navylight);border-color:var(--navy);color:var(--navymid)}
.ts.taken{opacity:.3;pointer-events:none;text-decoration:line-through}

/* GANHOS */
.g-hero{margin:16px 18px 0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy),var(--navy3));border-radius:var(--rl);padding:21px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.g-hero::before{content:"💰";position:absolute;right:-8px;bottom:-8px;font-size:4rem;opacity:.1}
.g-hero p{font-size:.76rem;opacity:.72;margin-bottom:3px}
.g-hero .am{font-family:"Syne",sans-serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:11px}

/* NOTIF */
.noti{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;padding:13px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s}
.noti:hover{background:rgba(34,43,107,.06)}
.noti.unr{background:rgba(34,43,107,.1)}
.ni-i{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.97rem;flex-shrink:0}
.ig{background:rgba(34,43,107,.32)}
.io{background:rgba(229,85,58,.14)}
.iy{background:rgba(245,200,66,.11)}
.ni-t h4{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px}
.ni-t p{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.4}
.ni-tm{font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted);margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0}

.tgg{display:inline-block;background:var(--navylight);color:var(--navymid);font-size:.64rem;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:50px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}

/* TOAST */
.toast{position:absolute;bottom:82px;left:18px;right:18px;background:var(--dark3);border-radius:13px;padding:13px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;border:1px solid rgba(34,43,107,.45);z-index:999;animation:tIn .3s ease,tOut .3s ease 2.5s forwards;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.6)}
@keyframes tIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(15px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes tOut{from{opacity:1}to{opacity:0;pointer-events:none}}
.ti{font-size:1.15rem}
.tt h4{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700}
.tt p{font-size:.69rem;color:var(--muted)}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="app">

<!-- SPLASH -->
<div id="s-splash" class="screen active">
  <div class="sp-glow"></div>
  <div class="sp-content">
    <div class="sp-logobox">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="logo-splash" alt="DogFy">
    </div>
    <div class="sp-tag">Passeios com amor e confiança</div>
  </div>
  <div class="sp-cta">
    <button class="btn btn-cream" onclick="goToLogin('tutor')">🐶 Sou Dono de Cachorro</button>
    <button class="btn btn-ol" onclick="goToLogin('passeador')">🦮 Quero Ser Passeador</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- LOGIN -->
<div id="s-login" class="screen">
  <div class="lh">
    <button class="bk" onclick="goTo('s-splash')">←</button>
    <h2>Bem-vindo de volta</h2>
    <p>Entre na sua conta DogFy</p>
    <div class="type-pill">
      <div class="tp act" id="tp-t" onclick="swLogin('tutor')">🐶 Tutor</div>
      <div class="tp" id="tp-p" onclick="swLogin('passeador')">🦮 Passeador</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="sb">
    <div class="lf">
      <div><div class="fl">E-mail</div><div class="fw"><span class="fi">📧</span><input type="email" placeholder="seu@email.com"></div></div>
      <div><div class="fl">Senha</div><div class="fw"><span class="fi">🔒</span><input type="password" placeholder="••••••••"></div></div>
      <button class="btn btn-navy" onclick="doLogin()">Entrar no DogFy</button>
      <div class="ldiv">ou continue com</div>
      <button class="btn btn-ol" onclick="toast('Apple ID','🍎 Entrando...')">🍎 Entrar com Apple</button>
      <button class="btn btn-ol" onclick="toast('Google','🌐 Entrando...')">🌐 Entrar com Google</button>
      <p class="lftr">Não tem conta? <a onclick="toast('Em breve!','Cadastro chegando 🐾')">Criar conta</a></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- HOME TUTOR -->
<div id="s-ht" class="screen">
  <div class="topbar"><img src="data:image/png;base64," class="logo-img" alt="DogFy"><div class="tr"><button class="ibtn nd" onclick="goTo('s-notif')">🔔</button><button class="ibtn" onclick="setT('perfil')">👤</button></div></div>
  <div class="sb">
    <div style="padding:20px 18px 0"><p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.85rem">Bom dia 👋</p><h2 style="font-size:1.48rem;font-weight:800;margin-top:2px">Olá, <span style="color:var(--navymid)">Ana</span>!</h2></div>
    <div class="nxt">
      <div class="nxt-lb">Próximo Passeio</div>
      <div class="nxt-ti">Passeio com o Bidu</div>
      <div class="nxt-in">Carlos M. • Amanhã, 08:00</div>
      <div class="nxt-ch"><div class="chip">📍 500m</div><div class="chip">⏱️ 45 min</div><div class="chip">⭐ 4.9</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sh"><h3>Passeadores Perto de Você</h3><button class="sa" onclick="setT('buscar')">Ver todos</button></div>
    <div class="prow">
      <div class="pc" onclick="goTo('s-dtl')"><div class="pc-av">🧑<div class="on"></div></div><div class="pc-nm">Carlos M.</div><div class="pc-dt">📍 0,4 km</div><div class="pc-st">⭐ 4.9 (87)</div></div>
      <div class="pc" onclick="goTo('s-dtl')"><div class="pc-av">👩<div class="on"></div></div><div class="pc-nm">Julia S.</div><div class="pc-dt">📍 0,8 km</div><div class="pc-st">⭐ 4.8 (124)</div></div>
      <div class="pc" onclick="goTo('s-dtl')"><div class="pc-av">🧔</div><div class="pc-nm">Rafael T.</div><div class="pc-dt">📍 1,2 km</div><div class="pc-st">⭐ 4.7 (63)</div></div>
      <div class="pc" onclick="goTo('s-dtl')"><div class="pc-av">👱‍♀️<div class="on"></div></div><div class="pc-nm">Bianca R.</div><div class="pc-dt">📍 1,5 km</div><div class="pc-st">⭐ 5.0 (42)</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sh"><h3>Seus Agendamentos</h3><button class="sa" onclick="setT('agenda')">Ver todos</button></div>
    <div class="alist" style="padding-bottom:16px">
      <div class="ai" onclick="setT('agenda')"><div class="ai-dt"><div class="day">22</div><div class="mon">Abr</div></div><div class="ai-if"><h4>Bidu — Carlos M.</h4><p>08:00 • 45 min • Parque</p></div><div class="tag tg">Confirmado</div></div>
      <div class="ai" onclick="setT('agenda')"><div class="ai-dt"><div class="day">24</div><div class="mon">Abr</div></div><div class="ai-if"><h4>Bidu — Julia S.</h4><p>09:30 • 30 min • Quarteirão</p></div><div class="tag ty">Pendente</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="bnav">
    <div class="ni act" onclick="setT('home')"><div class="ni-ic">🏠</div><div class="ni-lb">Início</div></div>
    <div class="ni" onclick="setT('buscar')"><div class="ni-ic">🔍</div><div class="ni-lb">Buscar</div></div>
    <div class="ni" onclick="setT('agenda')"><div class="ni-ic">📅</div><div class="ni-lb">Agenda</div></div>
    <div class="ni" onclick="setT('perfil')"><div class="ni-ic">👤</div><div class="ni-lb">Perfil</div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- BUSCAR -->
<div id="s-bt" class="screen">
  <div class="topbar"><img src="data:image/png;base64," class="logo-img" alt="DogFy"><div class="tr"><button class="ibtn nd" onclick="goTo('s-notif')">🔔</button></div></div>
  <div class="sw"><input class="sbar" type="text" placeholder="Buscar passeadores..."></div>
  <div class="frow"><div class="fc act" onclick="sfc(this)">Todos</div><div class="fc" onclick="sfc(this)">Online agora</div><div class="fc" onclick="sfc(this)">Melhor avaliação</div><div class="fc" onclick="sfc(this)">Mais próximos</div></div>
  <div class="sb">
    <div class="pcf" onclick="goTo('s-dtl')"><div class="pcf-tp"><div class="pcf-av">🧑</div><div><div class="pcf-nm">Carlos Mendes <span class="tgg">Mestre ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</span></div><div class="pcf-mt">📍 0,4 km • 3 anos</div><div class="pcf-rt"><span>⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</span><span>4.9 (87)</span></div></div></div><div class="ptags"><span class="ptag">🐕 Cães grandes</span><span class="ptag">🏃 Trilha</span><span class="ptag">💊 Medicação</span></div><div class="pcf-bt"><div class="pcf-pr">R$ 35 <span>/ passeio</span></div><button class="btns btns-n" onclick="event.stopPropagation();goTo('s-ag');buildCal()" style="flex:0">Agendar</button></div></div>
    <div class="pcf" onclick="goTo('s-dtl')"><div class="pcf-tp"><div class="pcf-av">👩</div><div><div class="pcf-nm">Julia Santos <span class="tgg">Guardião ⭐⭐⭐</span></div><div class="pcf-mt">📍 0,8 km • 1 ano</div><div class="pcf-rt"><span>⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</span><span>4.8 (124)</span></div></div></div><div class="ptags"><span class="ptag">🐩 Cães pequenos</span><span class="ptag">🌳 Parques</span></div><div class="pcf-bt"><div class="pcf-pr">R$ 28 <span>/ passeio</span></div><button class="btns btns-n" onclick="event.stopPropagation();goTo('s-ag');buildCal()" style="flex:0">Agendar</button></div></div>
    <div class="pcf" onclick="goTo('s-dtl')"><div class="pcf-tp"><div class="pcf-av">🧔</div><div><div class="pcf-nm">Rafael Torres <span class="tgg">Guardião ⭐⭐⭐</span></div><div class="pcf-mt">📍 1,2 km • 2 anos</div><div class="pcf-rt"><span>⭐⭐⭐⭐</span><span>4.7 (63)</span></div></div></div><div class="ptags"><span class="ptag">🐕 Todos os portes</span><span class="ptag">🌙 Noturno</span></div><div class="pcf-bt"><div class="pcf-pr">R$ 30 <span>/ passeio</span></div><button class="btns btns-n" onclick="event.stopPropagation();goTo('s-ag');buildCal()" style="flex:0">Agendar</button></div></div>
    <div class="pcf" onclick="goTo('s-dtl')" style="margin-bottom:16px"><div class="pcf-tp"><div class="pcf-av">👱‍♀️</div><div><div class="pcf-nm">Bianca Rocha <span class="tgg">Mestre ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</span></div><div class="pcf-mt">📍 1,5 km • 4 anos</div><div class="pcf-rt"><span>⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</span><span>5.0 (42)</span></div></div></div><div class="ptags"><span class="ptag">🎓 Adestramento</span><span class="ptag">💆 Comportamento</span></div><div class="pcf-bt"><div class="pcf-pr">R$ 45 <span>/ passeio</span></div><button class="btns btns-n" onclick="event.stopPropagation();goTo('s-ag');buildCal()" style="flex:0">Agendar</button></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="bnav"><div class="ni" onclick="setT('home')"><div class="ni-ic">🏠</div><div class="ni-lb">Início</div></div><div class="ni act" onclick="setT('buscar')"><div class="ni-ic">🔍</div><div class="ni-lb">Buscar</div></div><div class="ni" onclick="setT('agenda')"><div class="ni-ic">📅</div><div class="ni-lb">Agenda</div></div><div class="ni" onclick="setT('perfil')"><div class="ni-ic">👤</div><div class="ni-lb">Perfil</div></div></div>
</div>

<!-- AGENDA TUTOR -->
<div id="s-at" class="screen">
  <div class="topbar"><img src="data:image/png;base64," class="logo-img" alt="DogFy"><div class="tr"><button class="btns btns-n" onclick="goTo('s-ag');buildCal()" style="padding:8px 14px;font-size:.72rem;border-radius:50px">+ Novo</button></div></div>
  <div class="tab-row"><button class="tpill act" onclick="stab(this,'at-p')">Próximos</button><button class="tpill" onclick="stab(this,'at-c')">Concluídos</button><button class="tpill" onclick="stab(this,'at-x')">Cancelados</button></div>
  <div class="sb">
    <div id="at-p">
      <div class="acard"><div class="ac-hd ok"><div class="ac-t">Passeio do Bidu 🐶</div><div class="ac-b">Confirmado</div></div><div class="ac-bd"><div class="ac-r"><span class="ac-ic">👤</span><span class="ac-tx"><strong>Carlos Mendes</strong> • Mestre ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</span></div><div class="ac-r"><span class="ac-ic">📅</span><span class="ac-tx"><strong>Amanhã</strong>, 22 Abr • 08:00–08:45</span></div><div class="ac-r"><span class="ac-ic">📍</span><span class="ac-tx">Parque Estadual do Jaraguá</span></div><div class="ac-r"><span class="ac-ic">💰</span><span class="ac-tx"><strong>R$ 35,00</strong> • Pago via app</span></div></div><div class="ac-ac"><button class="btns btns-d" onclick="toast('Chat','💬 Abrindo conversa')">💬 Chat</button><button class="btns btns-n" onclick="toast('Acompanhando!','🗺️ GPS em tempo real')">🗺️ Acompanhar</button></div></div>
      <div class="acard" style="margin-bottom:12px"><div class="ac-hd pend"><div class="ac-t">Passeio do Bidu 🐶</div><div class="ac-b">Aguardando</div></div><div class="ac-bd"><div class="ac-r"><span class="ac-ic">👤</span><span class="ac-tx"><strong>Julia Santos</strong> • Guardião ⭐⭐⭐</span></div><div class="ac-r"><span class="ac-ic">📅</span><span class="ac-tx"><strong>Quinta</strong>, 24 Abr • 09:30–10:00</span></div><div class="ac-r"><span class="ac-ic">💰</span><span class="ac-tx"><strong>R$ 28,00</strong> • Pendente</span></div></div><div class="ac-ac"><button class="btns btns-d" onclick="toast('Cancelado','Cancelamento efetuado')">Cancelar</button><button class="btns btns-n" onclick="toast('Pagamento!','💳 Aguardando confirmação')">Pagar R$28</button></div></div>
    </div>
    <div id="at-c" style="display:none"><div class="acard" style="margin-bottom:12px"><div class="ac-hd dn"><div class="ac-t" style="color:var(--muted)">Passeio do Bidu</div><div class="ac-b">Concluído</div></div><div class="ac-bd"><div class="ac-r"><span class="ac-ic">👤</span><span class="ac-tx"><strong>Carlos Mendes</strong></span></div><div class="ac-r"><span class="ac-ic">📅</span><span class="ac-tx">19 Abr • 08:00–08:45</span></div><div class="ac-r"><span class="ac-ic">📸</span><span class="ac-tx"><strong>4 fotos</strong> • Relatório disponível</span></div><div class="ac-r"><span class="ac-ic">💰</span><span class="ac-tx"><strong>R$ 35,00</strong> • Pago</span></div></div><div class="ac-ac"><button class="btns btns-d" onclick="toast('Relatório','📋 Abrindo')">📋 Relatório</button><button class="btns btns-n" onclick="toast('Obrigada!','⭐ Avaliação enviada')">⭐ Avaliar</button></div></div></div>
    <div id="at-x" style="display:none"><div style="text-align:center;padding:56px 18px;color:var(--muted)"><div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:10px">🚫</div><p style="font-size:.85rem">Nenhum cancelamento</p></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="bnav"><div class="ni" onclick="setT('home')"><div class="ni-ic">🏠</div><div class="ni-lb">Início</div></div><div class="ni" onclick="setT('buscar')"><div class="ni-ic">🔍</div><div class="ni-lb">Buscar</div></div><div class="ni act" onclick="setT('agenda')"><div class="ni-ic">📅</div><div class="ni-lb">Agenda</div></div><div class="ni" onclick="setT('perfil')"><div class="ni-ic">👤</div><div class="ni-lb">Perfil</div></div></div>
</div>

<!-- PERFIL TUTOR -->
<div id="s-pt" class="screen">
  <div class="topbar"><img src="data:image/png;base64," class="logo-img" alt="DogFy"><div class="tr"><button class="ibtn" onclick="toast('Config','⚙️ Em breve')">⚙️</button></div></div>
  <div class="sb">
    <div class="ph"><div class="pav-w"><div class="pav">👩</div><div class="av-ed">✏️</div></div><div class="pname">Ana Lima</div><div class="psub">ana@email.com • São Paulo, SP</div><div class="pplan">🏃 Plano Rolê — 15 passeios/mês</div></div>
    <div class="pstats"><div class="psi"><div class="psn">47</div><div class="psl">Passeios</div></div><div class="psi"><div class="psn">2</div><div class="psl">Pets</div></div><div class="psi"><div class="psn">5</div><div class="psl">Passeadores</div></div></div>
    <div style="padding:13px 18px 8px"><h3 style="font-size:.87rem;font-weight:700">Meus Pets</h3></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;padding:0 18px 13px;overflow-x:auto">
      <div style="min-width:98px;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--r);padding:12px;text-align:center;border:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0"><div style="font-size:1.75rem;margin-bottom:4px">🐕</div><div style="font-size:.79rem;font-weight:700">Bidu</div><div style="font-size:.67rem;color:var(--muted)">Golden • 3a</div></div>
      <div style="min-width:98px;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--r);padding:12px;text-align:center;border:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0"><div style="font-size:1.75rem;margin-bottom:4px">🐩</div><div style="font-size:.79rem;font-weight:700">Mel</div><div style="font-size:.67rem;color:var(--muted)">Poodle • 5a</div></div>
      <div style="min-width:80px;background:var(--dark3);border-radius:var(--r);padding:12px;text-align:center;border:1.5px dashed rgba(255,255,255,.08);flex-shrink:0;cursor:pointer;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:5px" onclick="toast('Adicionar Pet','🐾 Em breve')"><div style="font-size:1.25rem;color:var(--muted)">+</div><div style="font-size:.67rem;color:var(--muted)">Adicionar</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pmenu" style="margin-bottom:20px">
      <div class="pmi" onclick="toast('Plano','💳 Gerenciar assinatura')"><div class="pmi-ic">💳</div><div class="pmi-tx"><h4>Plano Atual</h4><p>Rolê — R$69,90/mês</p></div><span class="pmi-ar">›</span></div>
      <div class="pmi" onclick="toast('Pagamentos','💰 Histórico')"><div class="pmi-ic">💰</div><div class="pmi-tx"><h4>Pagamentos</h4><p>Histórico e métodos</p></div><span class="pmi-ar">›</span></div>
      <div class="pmi" onclick="goTo('s-notif')"><div class="pmi-ic">🔔</div><div class="pmi-tx"><h4>Notificações</h4><p>3 novas</p></div><span class="pbadge">3</span></div>
      <div class="pmi" onclick="toast('Avaliações','⭐ 47 avaliações')"><div class="pmi-ic">⭐</div><div class="pmi-tx"><h4>Minhas Avaliações</h4><p>47 feitas</p></div><span class="pmi-ar">›</span></div>
      <div class="pmi" onclick="toast('Suporte','🆘 Central de atendimento')"><div class="pmi-ic">🆘</div><div class="pmi-tx"><h4>Ajuda e Suporte</h4><p>Central</p></div><span class="pmi-ar">›</span></div>
      <div class="pmi" onclick="doLogout()"><div class="pmi-ic">🚪</div><div class="pmi-tx"><h4 style="color:#e5553a">Sair da conta</h4><p>ana@email.com</p></div><span class="pmi-ar">›</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="bnav"><div class="ni" onclick="setT('home')"><div class="ni-ic">🏠</div><div class="ni-lb">Início</div></div><div class="ni" onclick="setT('buscar')"><div class="ni-ic">🔍</div><div class="ni-lb">Buscar</div></div><div class="ni" onclick="setT('agenda')"><div class="ni-ic">📅</div><div class="ni-lb">Agenda</div></div><div class="ni act" onclick="setT('perfil')"><div class="ni-ic">👤</div><div class="ni-lb">Perfil</div></div></div>
</div>

<!-- DETALHE PASSEADOR -->
<div id="s-dtl" class="screen">
  <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:10;padding:46px 14px 0;display:flex;justify-content:space-between">
    <button class="ibtn" style="background:rgba(14,16,32,.82);backdrop-filter:blur(8px)" onclick="goBack()">←</button>
    <button class="ibtn" style="background:rgba(14,16,32,.82);backdrop-filter:blur(8px)" onclick="toast('Compartilhado!','🔗 Link copiado')">⬆</button>
  </div>
  <div class="sb">
    <div class="dh"><div class="d-av">🧑</div><div class="d-nm">Carlos Mendes</div><div class="d-sb">São Paulo, SP • 3 anos de experiência</div><div class="d-rt"><span class="sts">⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</span><span style="font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700">4.9</span><span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted)">(87)</span><span class="tgg" style="margin-left:4px">Mestre</span></div></div>
    <div class="dsts"><div class="dsi"><div class="dsn">247</div><div class="dsl">Passeios</div></div><div class="dsi"><div class="dsn">4.9★</div><div class="dsl">Avaliação</div></div><div class="dsi"><div class="dsn">98%</div><div class="dsl">Resposta</div></div></div>
    <div class="dsec"><h3>Sobre Carlos</h3><p style="font-size:.81rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.64">Apaixonado por animais há 10 anos. Especialista em cães de grande porte e trilhas. Formado em Medicina Veterinária com certificação em comportamento animal.</p></div>
    <div class="dsec"><h3>Especialidades</h3><div class="ptags"><span class="ptag">🐕 Cães grandes</span><span class="ptag">🏃 Trilha</span><span class="ptag">💊 Medicação</span><span class="ptag">🎓 Adestramento</span><span class="ptag">📸 Fotos</span><span class="ptag">🗺️ GPS</span></div></div>
    <div class="dsec"><h3>Avaliações</h3>
      <div class="rv"><div class="rv-tp"><span style="font-size:1.1rem">👩</span><span class="rv-nm">Marina T.</span><span class="rv-st">⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</span></div><div class="rv-tx">Carlos é incrível! Meu golden adora ele e sempre recebo fotos lindas.</div></div>
      <div class="rv"><div class="rv-tp"><span style="font-size:1.1rem">🧔</span><span class="rv-nm">Pedro A.</span><span class="rv-st">⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</span></div><div class="rv-tx">Super pontual. Relatório completo e cão chegou feliz e cansado.</div></div>

    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- AGENDAR -->

  <div class="sb">
    <div style="padding:13px 18px 0"><div style="background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--r);padding:12px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;border:1px solid var(--border)"><div style="font-size:1.4rem">🧑</div><div><div style="font-size:.84rem;font-weight:700">Carlos Mendes</div><div style="font-size:.69rem;color:var(--muted)">Mestre ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ • R$35/passeio</div></div></div></div>
    <div style="padding:12px 18px 7px"><h3 style="font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700">Selecione o Pet</h3></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:9px;padding:0 18px 12px">
      <div id="pet-b" style="flex:1;background:var(--navylight);border-radius:var(--r);padding:11px;text-align:center;border:1.5px solid var(--navy);cursor:pointer" onclick="selPet('b')"><div style="font-size:1.4rem">🐕</div><div style="font-size:.77rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:3px">Bidu</div><div style="font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted)">Golden</div></div>
      <div id="pet-m" style="flex:1;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--r);padding:11px;text-align:center;border:1.5px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer" onclick="selPet('m')"><div style="font-size:1.4rem">🐩</div><div style="font-size:.77rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:3px">Mel</div><div style="font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted)">Poodle</div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:0 18px 7px"><h3 style="font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700">Escolha a Data</h3></div>
    <div class="cal"><div class="cal-hd"><button class="cal-nv">‹</button><span class="cal-mn">Abril 2026</span><button class="cal-nv">›</button></div><div class="cal-dh"><span>Dom</span><span>Seg</span><span>Ter</span><span>Qua</span><span>Qui</span><span>Sex</span><span>Sáb</span></div><div class="cal-ds" id="cal-grid"></div></div>
    <div style="padding:0 18px 7px"><h3 style="font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700">Horário</h3></div>
    <div class="tslots"><div class="ts taken">07:00</div><div class="ts" onclick="sts(this)">08:00</div><div class="ts" onclick="sts(this)">09:00</div><div class="ts" onclick="sts(this)">10:00</div><div class="ts taken">11:00</div><div class="ts" onclick="sts(this)">14:00</div><div class="ts" onclick="sts(this)">15:00</div><div class="ts" onclick="sts(this)">16:00</div><div class="ts" onclick="sts(this)">17:00</div></div>
    <div style="padding:0 18px 7px"><h3 style="font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700">Tipo de Passeio</h3></div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;padding:0 18px 12px">
      <div class="ts sel" onclick="stt(this)" style="border-radius:12px;padding:11px;text-align:left;height:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px"><span>🏘️</span><strong style="font-size:.79rem">Quarteirão</strong><span style="font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted)">30 min</span></div>
      <div class="ts" onclick="stt(this)" style="border-radius:12px;padding:11px;text-align:left;height:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px"><span>🌳</span><strong style="font-size:.79rem">Parque</strong><span style="font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted)">45 min</span></div>
      <div class="ts" onclick="stt(this)" style="border-radius:12px;padding:11px;text-align:left;height:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px"><span>🏃</span><strong style="font-size:.79rem">Trilha</strong><span style="font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted)">60 min</span></div>
      <div class="ts" onclick="stt(this)" style="border-radius:12px;padding:11px;text-align:left;height:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px"><span>🌙</span><strong style="font-size:.79rem">Noturno</strong><span style="font-size:.66em;color:var(--muted)">40 min</span></div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:0 18px 12px"><div style="background:var(--dark2);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--border)"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px"><span style="font-size:.79rem;color:var(--muted)">1x passeio quarteirão</span><span style="font-size:.79rem;font-weight:600">R$ 35,00</span></div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px"><span style="font-size:.79rem;color:var(--muted)">Taxa da plataforma</span><span style="font-size:.79rem;font-weight:600">R$ 3,50</span></div><div style="height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:9px 0"></div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between"><span style="font-size:.87rem;font-weight:700">Total</span><span style="font-size:1.01rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navymid)">R$ 38,50</span></div></div></div>
    <div style="padding:0 18px 22px"><button class="btn btn-navy" onclick="confirmAg()">Confirmar • R$ 38,50</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

    <div class="ph"><div class="pav-w"><div class="pav">🧑</div><div class="av-ed">✏️</div></div><div class="pname">Carlos Mendes</div><div class="psub">carlos@email.com • São Paulo, SP</div><div class="pplan">🏆 Mestre ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</div></div>
    <div class="pstats"><div class="psi"><div class="psn">247</div><div class="psl">Passeios</div></div><div class="psi"><div class="psn">4.9★</div><div class="psl">Nota</div></div><div class="psi"><div class="psn">R$8.6k</div><div class="psl">Total</div></div></div>
    <div class="nv"><div class="nv-h"><div><div style="font-size:.66rem;color:var(--navymid);opacity:.7;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1px">NÍVEL ATUAL</div><div class="nv-lv">🏆 Mestre</div></div><div class="nv-st">⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</div></div><div class="nv-b"><div class="nv-pl"><span>Passeios este mês</span><span style="color:var(--navymid)">32 / 40</span></div><div class="nv-bar"><div class="nv-fi" style="width:80%"></div></div><div style="font-size:.69rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:5px">Mais 8 passeios para bônus Mestre Ouro</div></div></div>
    <div class="pmenu" style="margin-bottom:20px;margin-top:13px">
      <div class="pmi" onclick="toast('Disponibilidade','📅 Gerencie horários')"><div class="pmi-ic">📅</div><div class="pmi-tx"><h4>Disponibilidade</h4><p>Configure seus horários</p></div><span class="pmi-ar">›</span></div>
      <div class="pmi" onclick="toast('Área de atuação','📍 Raio de 2km ativo')"><div class="pmi-ic">📍</div><div class="pmi-tx"><h4>Área de Atuação</h4><p>Raio de 2km ativo</p></div><span class="pmi-ar">›</span></div>
      <div class="pmi" onclick="goTo('s-notiP')"><div class="pmi-ic">🔔</div><div class="pmi-tx"><h4>Notificações</h4><p>2 novas solicitações</p></div><span class="pbadge">2</span></div>
      <div class="pmi" onclick="toast('Avaliações','⭐ 87 avaliações')"><div class="pmi-ic">⭐</div><div class="pmi-tx"><h4>Minhas Avaliações</h4><p>87 recebidas</p></div><span class="pmi-ar">›</span></div>
      <div class="pmi" onclick="doLogout()"><div class="pmi-ic">🚪</div><div class="pmi-tx"><h4 style="color:#e5553a">Sair da conta</h4><p>carlos@email.com</p></div><span class="pmi-ar">›</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="bnav"><div class="ni" onclick="setP('home')"><div class="ni-ic">🏠</div><div class="ni-lb">Início</div></div><div class="ni" onclick="setP('agenda')"><div class="ni-ic">📅</div><div class="ni-lb">Agenda</div></div><div class="ni" onclick="setP('ganhos')"><div class="ni-ic">💰</div><div class="ni-lb">Ganhos</div></div><div class="ni act" onclick="setP('perfil')"><div class="ni-ic">👤</div><div class="ni-lb">Perfil</div></div></div>
</div>

<!-- NOTIF PASSEADOR -->
<div id="s-notiP" class="screen">
  <div class="topbar"><button class="ibtn" onclick="goBack()">←</button><h2 style="font-size:.92rem;font-weight:700">Notificações</h2><button style="background:none;border:none;color:var(--navymid);font-size:.76rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer">Ler tudo</button></div>
  <div class="sb">
    <div style="padding:7px 18px 3px;font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em">Hoje</div>
    <div class="noti unr"><div class="ni-i io">🐶</div><div class="ni-t"><h4>Nova solicitação!</h4><p>Ana Lima quer agendar Bidu amanhã 08:00.</p></div><div class="ni-tm">10min</div></div>
    <div class="noti unr"><div class="ni-i ig">⭐</div><div class="ni-t"><h4>Avaliação 5 estrelas!</h4><p>Ana Lima avaliou o último passeio com 5★.</p></div><div class="ni-tm">2h</div></div>
    <div style="padding:10px 18px 3px;font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em">Ontem</div>
    <div class="noti"><div class="ni-i ig">💰</div><div class="ni-t"><h4>Pagamento recebido</h4><p>R$35,00 — passeio do Bidu.</p></div><div class="ni-tm">1d</div></div>
    <div class="noti" style="border-bottom:none"><div class="ni-i iy">🏆</div><div class="ni-t"><h4>Você está no Top 10!</h4><p>Sua nota te colocou entre os melhores.</p></div><div class="ni-tm">1d</div></div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
<script>
let lt='tutor',stk=[];
function goTo(id){const p=document.querySelector('.screen.active');if(p){stk.push(p.id);p.classList.remove('active')}document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active')}
function goBack(){if(!stk.length)return;document.querySelector('.screen.active').classList.remove('active');document.getElementById(stk.pop()).classList.add('active')}
function goToLogin(t){lt=t;document.getElementById('tp-t').classList.toggle('act',t==='tutor');document.getElementById('tp-p').classList.toggle('act',t==='passeador');goTo('s-login')}
function swLogin(t){lt=t;document.getElementById('tp-t').classList.toggle('act',t==='tutor');document.getElementById('tp-p').classList.toggle('act',t==='passeador')}
function doLogin(){stk=[];if(lt==='tutor')goTo('s-ht');else goTo('s-hp')}
function doLogout(){stk=[];goTo('s-splash')}
const tM={home:'s-ht',buscar:'s-bt',agenda:'s-at',perfil:'s-pt'};
function setT(t){stk=[];goTo(tM[t])}
const pM={home:'s-hp',agenda:'s-ap',ganhos:'s-gp',perfil:'s-pp'};
function setP(t){stk=[];goTo(pM[t])}
function stab(el,k){el.closest('.tab-row').querySelectorAll('.tpill').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('act'));el.classList.add('act');['at-p','at-c','at-x'].forEach(i=>{const e=document.getElementById(i);if(e)e.style.display='none'});const t=document.getElementById(k);if(t)t.style.display='block'}
function stabp(el,k){el.closest('.tab-row').querySelectorAll('.tpill').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('act'));el.classList.add('act');['ap-p','ap-d'].forEach(i=>{const e=document.getElementById(i);if(e)e.style.display='none'});const t=document.getElementById(k);if(t)t.style.display='block'}
function selPet(p){['b','m'].forEach(id=>{const e=document.getElementById('pet-'+id);const a=id===p;e.style.background=a?'var(--navylight)':' var(--dark2)';e.style.borderColor=a?'var(--navy)':' var(--border)'})}
function sts(el){document.querySelectorAll('.ts:not(.taken)').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('sel'));el.classList.add('sel')}
function stt(el){el.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.ts').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('sel'));el.classList.add('sel')}
function sfc(el){el.closest('.frow').querySelectorAll('.fc').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('act'));el.classList.add('act')}
function buildCal(){const g=document.getElementById('cal-grid');if(!g)return;g.innerHTML='';for(let i=0;i<3;i++){const d=document.createElement('button');d.className='cd emp';d.textContent='';g.appendChild(d)}for(let d=1;d<=30;d++){const b=document.createElement('button');b.className='cd';if(d===21)b.classList.add('today');if(d===22)b.classList.add('sel');if([22,24,26].includes(d))b.classList.add('ev');b.textContent=d;b.onclick=()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.cd').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('sel'));b.classList.add('sel')};g.appendChild(b)}}
function confirmAg(){toast('Agendado! 🎉','Carlos foi notificado. Aguarde confirmação.');setTimeout(()=>{stk=[];goTo('s-at')},1900)}
function toast(title,sub){const old=document.querySelector('.toast');if(old)old.remove();const t=document.createElement('div');t.className='toast';t.innerHTML=`<span class="ti">🐾</span><div class="tt"><h4>${title}</h4><p>${sub}</p></div>`;document.getElementById('app').appendChild(t);setTimeout(()=>t.remove(),3200)}
buildCal();
</script>
</body>
</html>
